unified_profile.profile_summary: Patient is experiencing chronic insomnia, with a primary disorder of insomnia and an overall confidence of 0.7542. The sleep model detected insomnia with a confidence of 0.8200, while the lifestyle model detected insufficient sleep hours due to excessive caffeine intake and high screen time. The NLP mental health model detected anxiety as the primary mental state, with a confidence of 0.7600. Conflicts were detected between the sleep and NLP models, as well as between the sleep and lifestyle models.

reasoning_report.reasoning_summary: Patient is experiencing chronic insomnia, with a primary disorder of insomnia and an overall confidence of 0.7542. The sleep model detected insomnia with a confidence of 0.8200, while the lifestyle model detected insufficient sleep hours due to excessive caffeine intake and high screen time. The NLP mental health model detected anxiety as the primary mental state, with a confidence of 0.7600. Conflicts were detected between the sleep and NLP models, as well as between the sleep and lifestyle models. The patient may be experiencing insomnia as a symptom of underlying anxiety, and may require treatment for both conditions.

psychoeducation.description: Establishing a consistent sleep schedule, avoiding caffeine and electronics before bedtime, and creating a relaxing sleep environment
Engaging in relaxation techniques, such as deep breathing and progressive muscle relaxation, to manage anxiety and promote sleep

progress_metrics.description: Subjective report of sleep quality, ranging from 1 (poor) to 5 (excellent)
Subjective report of anxiety levels, ranging from 1 (low) to 5 (high)

contraindications.description: Avoiding sleep restriction due to potential exacerbation of anxiety

final_output.plan_summary: The patient is experiencing chronic insomnia, with a primary disorder of insomnia and an overall confidence of 0.7542. The plan aims to address the root causes of insomnia, including excessive caffeine intake, high screen time before bedtime, anxiety, work pressure and financial stress, social isolation, and insufficient sleep hours due to lifestyle habits. The patient is referred to a mental health professional for further evaluation and treatment of anxiety.
